calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Akele Atkins, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc.
Melanie Dean, the Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants SLE Enterprises, Inc., dba Performance Plumbing, a corporation, or Robin Lynn Ellis, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on August 1, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 9, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants SLE Enterprises, Inc., dba Performance Plumbing, a corporation, and Robin Lynn Ellis, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,341.08.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,642.14.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $519.96, for a total in the amount of $32,328.18.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Continued To Nov-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Sep-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
